card_description: Aristotelian concept of the purpose or goal inherent in a being; PKD used it for teleological evolution.
full_description:
Aristotelian concept of the purpose or goal inherent in a being; PKD used it for teleological evolution.

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_32.txt

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_44.txt

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_49.txt

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_57.txt

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_76.txt

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_89.txt

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_98.txt

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_102.txt

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_122.txt

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_129.txt

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_132.txt
